2026-04-20-adopt-storybook-component-cat.reason: Internal authoring convention for @aurora/components docs. The Storybook runtime was reverted, leaving a *.stories.ts convention plus a Claude agent-facing skill — no new public API or user-facing flow for platform consumers.

2026-04-22-catalyst-data-layer-skill.reason: New Claude Code skill (catalyst-data-layer) teaching the AI how to wire components/resolvers to @aurora/modules/graphql. Internal AI tooling only — proposal states 'No runtime code changes. This is a skill documentation change only.'

2026-04-22-catalyst-handler-composer-ski.reason: New Claude Code skill (catalyst-handler-composer) teaching the AI how to compose CLI-generated handlers in the catalyst backend. Internal AI tooling only — proposal states 'No runtime code changes. Documentation + skill only.'

2026-04-23-catalyst-backend-testing.reason: New backend Claude Code skill (catalyst-backend-testing) establishing initial testing conventions. Documentation + AI skill only, no runtime or public-API change; the CLI --tests flag remains a no-op.

2026-04-23-catalyst-field-schema.reason: New backend Claude Code skill (catalyst-field-schema) teaching the AI how to use the already-existing FieldSchema / @ApplySchema / QueryStatement layer. Documentation + AI skill only, no runtime or public-API change.

2026-04-23-catalyst-nestjs-primitives.reason: New backend Claude Code skill (catalyst-nestjs-primitives) cataloging already-existing catalyst guards and decorators plus upstream core-back primitives. Documentation + AI skill only, no runtime or public-API change.

2026-04-24-fix-many-to-many-null-guard.reason: Bug fix in generated Sequelize repository — createdAggregateHook now guards m2m payload fields with Array.isArray. No contract change.

2026-04-27-spec-14-form-field-width-syst.reason: Bundled into the broader frontend SPEC cluster; tracked via concept pages instead of per-spec changelog entries.
